evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent detects the missing file targets and format. It performs a quick search to suggest files and asks the user whether they need a .md or .zip file BEFORE writing any manifests.

evaluations.prompt: Bundle the src/api folder into a markdown file.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent has all required info, but DO NOT execute yet. It drafts a 'Context Bundle Plan' showing the target directory and format, and explicitly asks the user for confirmation ('Does this look right?') BEFORE running the python scripts.

Agent generates the file-manifest.json to disk using the directory shorthand ('src/api/'), then runs scripts/bundle.py. It does NOT manually explode the directory into an exhaustive file list in the JSON.
